title: bus.hearth.bead.changes v1
description: Bead checkpoint delta: the set of files and symbols that changed for a bead between two content hashes. Intended emitter: hearth-loom (per-bead checkpoint markers) — NOT YET IMPLEMENTED as of 2026-05-29; this schema codifies the contract ahead of the producer. Consumer: deer-flow BeadCheckpointRouter (packages/harness/deerflow/evidence/bead_checkpoint_router.py), which ingests it into the evidence ledger / SymbolLineageTracker. Validated against event['data'] (flat data-payload schema). Kept permissive (additionalProperties:true, minimal required) so the future producer can add fields without dead-lettering.

bead_id.description: Bead identifier the checkpoint belongs to (e.g. 'deer-flow-zu9f').

before_hash.description: Content hash before the checkpoint. Optional; consumer defaults to empty string.

after_hash.description: Content hash after the checkpoint. Optional; consumer defaults to empty string.

changed_files.description: Paths of files that changed in this checkpoint.

changed_symbols.description: Fully-qualified symbol names that changed in this checkpoint.

timestamp.description: RFC3339 UTC time of the checkpoint. Optional; consumer defaults to now().
